title: Announcement of Elections
description: The Election Commission of India announces the polling schedule, enforcing the Model Code of Conduct across the nation.

title: Phase 1 Polling
description: The largest phase of the Lok Sabha elections begins, with voters across numerous states and union territories casting their ballots.

title: Subsequent Phases
description: Polling continues in six more phases, covering the massive population and diverse geography of the country.

title: Counting of Votes
description: The Electronic Voting Machines (EVMs) are opened, and the votes are counted simultaneously across the nation to declare the results.

title: Government Formation
description: The party or coalition with the majority in the Lok Sabha forms the new government, and the Prime Minister is sworn into office.
